fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: West Virginia Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to West Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity west virginia, how to transfer pharmacist license to west virginia, pharmacist compact west virginia, west virginia pharmacist endorsement application

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in West Virginia.

steps.title: Create an account on the WVBP Online Portal
steps.description: Navigate to the WVBP Online Portal at https://wvbp.us.thentiacloud.net/webs/wvbp/register/, click 'Register', and follow the prompts to create your professional account.

steps.title: Complete and submit the online application
steps.description: Log into your WVBP Online Portal account, select 'Apply for a License/Permit', choose the appropriate 'Pharmacist' application (e.g., Examination or Score Transfer), and complete all required sections.

steps.title: Register for and pass the NAPLEX and MPJE exams
steps.description: Register with the National Association of Boards of Pharmacy (NABP) for the North American Pharmacist Licensure Examination (NAPLEX) and the Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE). The Board will verify your eligibility once your online application is submitted.

steps.title: Submit official transcripts and exam scores
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts from your ACPE-accredited pharmacy program and your NAPLEX/MPJE scores from NABP to be sent directly to the West Virginia Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Complete a criminal background check
steps.description: Follow instructions provided by the Board to complete the required fingerprint-based criminal background check through an approved vendor, such as IdentoGO.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a West Virginia pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does West Virginia have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in West Virginia. To work in West Virginia, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to West Virginia?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in West Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in West Virginia
hero.dek: To become a licensed pharmacist in West Virginia, applicants must apply through the WVBP Online Portal powered by Thentia Cloud.

official_links.registration_steps: On the WVBP Online Portal, click 'Register' to create a new professional account by providing your personal details and setting up login credentials.
